features: COMPACT TRAVEL SIZE WITH DUAL VOLTAGE: The travel hair dryer features a folding handle, making it very compact and easy to store in your suitcase, weekend bag or drawer. With dual voltage settings, you can easily switch between 240v for countries that use 220v-240v such as Europe, Middle East, Asia and Africa and 110v for countries that use 110v-120v such as USA, making this the perfect travel companion.
2 SPEED SETTINGS AND 2 HEAT SETTINGS: This hairdryer delivers max 1200w output with 2 fan speed settings and 2 airflow heat settings.
CONCENTRATOR NOZZLE ATTACHMENT: The removable concentrator nozzle attachment helps to focus the hot air to a more concentrated target of hair.

SMALL BUT POWERFUL: The Paul Anthony "Travel Dry" 1200w Travel Hair Dryer can be used to style all different types of hair, from short and curly to long and sculptured, with 2 speed settings to choose from to best suit your hair type.

SAFE AND PRACTICAL: This hair dryer is fitted with a special thermal cut-out safety device to protect you from the device over heating. This device features a folding handle function, meaning it is very compact and will fold up and fit in to your weekend bag or suitcase easily, there is also a hanging loop attached, meaning it is easy to store and makes it perfect for travel all round.
description: Product Description The Paul Anthony "Travel Dry" 1200w Travel Hair Dryer is quiet yet powerful and suits all different hair types. Pick from 2 fan speed setting and 2 airflow heat settings, it can be tailored to you. Simply plug in to the mains power and set the temperature and heat to your desired settings. Tailor your experience with a concentrated nozzle, helping to focus the hot air to a more concentrated target of hair. With a folding function and hanging loop, it is easy to store and perfect for travel. It also has a special thermal cut-out safety device to protect you from the device overheating. This device also has quiet whisper operation, yet still has 1200w power. Box Includes: 1x Paul Anthony "Travel Dry" 1200w Travel Hair Dryer 1x Concentrator Nozzle 1x Instruction Manual Directions 1. Plug in the hair dryer and ensure it is set to the correct voltage for your location. 2. Choose the desired heat and speed settings based on your hair type and style. 3. Attach the concentrator nozzle for more focused drying. 4. Hold the hair dryer at least 6 inches away from your hair and move it slowly from root to tip. 5. After use, turn off and unplug the hair dryer, then let it cool before storing. Safety Warning Avoid using the hair dryer while it is still hot. Allow it to cool down before storing or handling. Keep the hair dryer away from water and heated surfaces. Do not use the hair dryer while bathing or in a wet environment. Box Contains 1x Paul Anthony H1010SV 1200w travel hairdryer silver See more
